name: Bunnies are Happy
description:
Warning: Extreme objectification/hypnosis.

Late stage Earworm consists of the effected women compulsively humming or singing Happy Bunny even when they are not actively listening to it.

- Stage 2 Obsession: This stage begins after repeated continual exposure to the song over the period of a few days. Effected women in this stage find an obsessive pull towards the song and begin to embody its lyrics slowly, this begins with buying a bunny suit and dressing up as a bunny at home or in private situations. As the effected progress through this stage they will begin wearing the bunny suit more often and begin to act like a bunny even when not wearing a bunny suit.

- Stage 3 Completion: Once a woman has reached this stage they are now permanently a bunny girl with their personalities completely eroding to match the lyrics of the song. Effected women in this stage will compulsively fuck, suck, and please males happily and often work in brothels or strip clubs. Effected women in this stage also show a concerning urge to spread Happy Bunny to unaffected women attempting to brainwash more women into becoming bunnies.

Physical effects of Happy Bunny:

- Continual exposure to Happy Bunny can have effects on women due to changes in their mental state which can result in physical changes. Effected woman can have one or more of these effects happen to them: their breasts and ass grow, their frame becomes smaller, their pussy becomes tighter and deeper, their entire body becomes more sensitive, their senses start to crave males and cum, and/or they begin to produce extreme amounts of pheromones which attract males to them.

Directly inspired by Source Go give it a quick read if you like this idea.
